source: DGA Platforms Code — Foundations → Layout and spacing (https://design.dga.gov.sa/guidelines/foundations/layout-and-spacing), official page rendered and read 2026-06-16. Version label on page: الإصدار 1.0.
notes: Pixel (px) values are the authoritative scale captured from the official table and are internally consistent.

The official page also prints a rem column. For spacing-7xl..spacing-9xl and spacing-11xl, and for several width/paragraph rows, the printed rem does not equal px/16 (apparent source typos). Treat px as authoritative and confirm exact rem in the official Figma library before encoding rem.
Do not present these as official DGA compliance. These are verified value extractions for implementation alignment only.

grid.description: Platforms Code uses a column grid (columns, margins, gutters). A 12-column grid is commonly used for desktop, reducing to 2-4 columns at smaller aspect ratios. Exact column/margin/gutter values per breakpoint are defined in the official Figma library; verify there before encoding.
